title: No Hearts UI
description: Removes UI Hearts from the Game Rendering Engine
body:
🛑 No hearts – It's all up to your survival instincts!

💨 Minimalist look – Focus on the game, not the HUD.

💥 Hardcore challenge – Test your limits without knowing your HP!

⚔️ Immersive gameplay – For those craving more adrenaline and less clutter.



Whether you want the ultimate challenge or just a cleaner look while exploring, Heartless UI is your new go-to mod! 💀 Download now and see if you can survive when the UI goes heartless! 🌲🔥
![no hearts in ui](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/873ce6f3446caac833b0e77226e4868c59dc1493.png)
